+//
+//  String+UTF8.swift
+//  Tachikoma
+//
+
+import Foundation
+
+public extension String {
+    /// Convert the string to UTF-8 encoded `Data`.
+    func utf8Data() -> Data {
+        Data(self.utf8)
+    }
+}
